# Reference Topic

> [!summary]
> A curated landing page that orients a reader before they descend into the concept and entity pages.

## Overview

The reference-vault fixture keeps a single topic folder. This topic page is the
narrative landing page for that folder — distinct from the folder note, which is a
mechanical Map of Content. It orients a reader toward [[Provenance]] and
[[Sample Tool]], both grounded in [[Provenance Primer]].

## Key Pages

- [[Provenance]] — the concept page; what provenance is and why it matters.
- [[Sample Tool]] — the entity page; a fixture tool that records provenance.

## Open Questions

None — the fixture is intentionally small and complete.
